* Source: Headset (USB-C to 3.5mm Headphone Jack Adapter), MICROPHONE (Master Volume), L, volume: 0.250. Timing signal peak level -17.9 dBFS, measurement signal peak level -13.6 dBFS

*  C-weighting compensation: Off
